message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="luca-palmieri" color="blue" summary="CI green for Step 6, requesting reviews">
CI green for Step 6 commit `0143878` (run 21967506510). All checks passed.

Ready for review -- please check the implementation at commit `0143878` and provide your feedback.
</teammate-message>

content.text: I already sent my full review. Let me confirm receipt of the CI green status and point Luca to my earlier feedback.

input.content:
CI green noted. My full review was already sent -- check your earlier messages. 

Quick recap: one BLOCKING item (B1). The Next Actions page needs to show the project name for project-linked actions. US-GTD-3 criterion #4: "Each action shows its title, context, and associated project (if any)." The `NextActionView` struct needs a `project_name: Option<String>` field, and `next_action_item.html` needs a conditional project badge.

Everything else in Step 6 looks solid. Once B1 is fixed, you have my consensus.
input.summary: Review already sent, one blocker: project name on next actions

routing.summary: Review already sent, one blocker: project name on next actions
